title: Composition, Collaboration, and Dependency Boundaries · Scenario Checkpoint
summary: Connect catalog, lending policy, notification, clock, and persistence collaborators without hidden globals. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a composed circulation service. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Model has-a relationships with explicit ownership, lifetime, and mutation responsibilities.
Delegate behavior through a narrow collaborator API without leaking its complete representation.
Supply time, storage, messaging, and policy dependencies explicitly so behavior is replaceable and testable.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""python-oop cumulative stakeholder program."""

from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any

steps.title: Oop Composition Ownership · changed case
steps.instruction:
Use a changed quiz case derived from this module: python composition collaboration. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: Use a changed worked example case derived from this module: python composition collaboration. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result. A defensible solution applies Oop Composition Ownership, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to a complete first version of a composed circulation service while every earlier competency remains active.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: Composition means the parent must always create and destroy every collaborator. This fails the Oop Composition Ownership contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

steps.title: Defend one difficult decision
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Oop Tell Dont Ask applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Move decisions toward objects that own relevant information without creating command-heavy anemic or god objects.
